name: KwaCart
description: A Liberating Structures facilitation platform built with Django.

SECRET_KEY.description: A long random string used for cryptographic signing. Must be kept secret.

ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed hostnames (e.g. your-app.herokuapp.com).

CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated trusted origins for CSRF checks (e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com).
